title: Cirrus: Update CI VM images to match podman CI
body:
Note: Removed disused `PRIOR_FEDORA*` and `UBUNTU_*` references since
they're not actually used in this CI.  Further, F35 VM images were not
built as part of `c6013173500215296` due to a missing golang 1.18
requirement for podman.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body:
/hold

There's a problem with these images, new ones are needed.
changes LGTM @cevich, but not to the test system.
Yeah, I don't know what those errors are about.  Either way, we need new images built for another issue, so I'll wait for that.
After this is merged (@cevich should that happen now?), and a successful image build happens, we should close #1718.

> we should close https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1718.

Yes, this PR will fix that.
Woops, this is ready to go.
